questions.question: What is the purpose of the input() function in Python?
What is the syntax for reading input from the user in Python?
What is the purpose of the print() function in Python?
What is the difference between the input() function and the raw_input() function in Python?
keyPoints: input() function reads input as a Python expression
raw_input() function reads input as a string

questions.question: How do you handle exceptions when reading input from the user in Python?
Write a Python program that reads input from the user and displays the output.
keyPoints: Use the input() function to read input from the user
Use the print() function to display output to the user

questions.question: Write a Python program that reads input from a file and displays the output.
keyPoints: Use the open() function to open the file
Use the read() method to read the contents of the file
Use the print() function to display output to the user

questions.question: Write a Python program that writes output to a file.
keyPoints: Use the open() function to open the file
Use the write() method to write output to the file
